data.title: 10x Genomics partners with Dana-Farber Cancer Institute to study tumor biomarkers for better cancer therapies, aiming to establish a CLIA-certified lab.
data.description: A partnership with Dana-Farber Cancer Institute has been formed to pinpoint biomarkers associated with treatment efficacy for future cancer treatments and to create a clinical reporting structure for precision oncology. Additionally, plans are in place for 10x to set up a CLIA-certified laboratory to facilitate this initiative.

data.title: GitLab appoints Siva Padisetty as CTO, effective Jan 15, 2026. He will lead software engineering, operations, and customer support teams.
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. has named Siva Padisetty as the new Chief Technology Officer, taking on the role starting January 15, 2026. Padisetty will be responsible for leading GitLab's software engineering, operations, and customer support divisions to implement the company's technical goals and plans, as well as managing the creation and distribution of GitLab's products. Padisetty replaces Sabrina Farmer, who recently resigned from the position.

data.title: TurfMutt Foundation emphasizes benefits of winter outdoor activities for pets and people, focusing on physical health and social connections.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, on January 12, 2026, the TurfMutt Foundation emphasized the benefits of spending time outdoors during winter. The foundation highlighted that being outside can lead to reduced stress, enhanced mood, improved physical health, and increased social connections for individuals and pets alike. TurfMutt, an advocate for the continuous maintenance and enjoyment of backyards, aims to promote these advantages.

data.title: Global Sensors Market Report 2026-2036 profiles 280+ key players. Includes market forecasts, technology assessments, and competitive intelligence.
data.description: Dublin - A recent report titled "The Global Sensors Market 2026-2036" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides an in-depth analysis of the global sensor industry, offering precise market forecasts, technology evaluations, and competitive insights on both existing and developing sensor segments. It serves as a valuable resource for investors, technology innovators, and stakeholders within the industry. The report covers the period from 2026 to 2036, highlighting key trends and projections for this timeframe.

data.title: HCLTech partners with Magnum Ice Cream to revamp digital setup - a multi-year IT deal. (Characters: 88)
data.description: In NOIDA, India on January 12, 2026, HCLTech, a renowned technology company (NSE: HCLTECH.NS) (BSE: HCLTECH.BO), announced a new partnership. They will be working with The Magnum Ice Cream Company (TMICC) to create and oversee a cutting-edge IT infrastructure. This multi-year collaboration aims to ensure TMICC is equipped for the future with the latest technology solutions.

data.title: EnableComp acquires H/ROI to enhance revenue platform for healthcare providers, capturing hidden revenue from denials.
data.description: EnableComp, based in Franklin, Tennessee, has recently completed a strategic acquisition to enhance its capacity in identifying untapped revenue opportunities for healthcare providers stemming from intricate clinical denials and DRG validation. The acquisition, finalized on January 12, 2026, aims to bolster EnableComp's reputation for effectively addressing complex revenue cycle issues.

data.title: 10x Genomics partners to study blood-based diagnostics for autoimmune disease, identifying single cell immune signatures.
data.description: A recent research initiative seeks to pinpoint unique immune markers within individual cells to gauge disease progression and assess the effectiveness of treatments as part of patient care. 10x Genomics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TXG) based in Pleasanton, California, is spearheading this study. The company, renowned for its expertise in single cell and spatial biology, disclosed its partnership on January 12, 2026. This collaboration highlights a significant step towards enhancing clinical practices through a deeper understanding of immune responses at the cellular level.

data.title: Morrison Healthcare awarded by Modern Healthcare for sustainability.
data.description: Atlanta-based Morrison Healthcare has been honored by Modern Healthcare as a recipient of the Best in Business award in the Sustainability category. This recognition highlights Morrison Healthcare's commitment to environmentally friendly practices, showcasing their dedication to sustainability within their operations. Being selected as one of the award winners signifies Morrison Healthcare's exemplary efforts in promoting sustainability within the industry.

data.title: Collaboration between Woodford Reserve and Compartés releases limited-edition S'mores Chocolate Bar infused with Double Oaked Bourbon.
data.description: In Versailles, Kentucky, Woodford Reserve and Compartés have joined forces to introduce a limited-edition S'mores Chocolate Bar infused with Woodford Reserve Double Oaked Bourbon. This collaboration represents the third consecutive year of partnership between Master Distiller Elizabeth McCall and chocolatier Jonathan Grahm. The release aims to evoke campfire nostalgia and capitalize on the winter season by incorporating the distinctive flavors of Double Oaked Bourbon, such as vanilla, butterscotch, and caramel. This unique offering combines the expertise of both brands to create a delightful treat that resonates with consumers seeking a touch of indulgence.

data.title: Ai Technology Group Inc. (OTCID:AIPG) and AVM Biotechnology Inc. announce merger; details revealed in joint press release.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Ai Technology Group Inc. (OTCID:AIPG) based in Reno, Nevada, and AVM Biotechnology Inc. from Washington State announced a proposed merger in a joint press release. The merger involves AIPG acquiring AVM Biotechnology Inc. in the deal. This collaboration signifies a significant move in the industry, demonstrating the intention of both companies to combine their resources and expertise. AIPG, a technology company, and AVM, a biotechnology firm, aim to capitalize on their respective strengths through this merger. This partnership is expected to bring together their unique capabilities to drive innovation and growth in their shared market.

data.title: Omada Health releases estimated revenue figures for Q4 and FY 2025, exceeding $X million.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the annual revenue of the tech giant reached $100 billion for the first time in their history. The company's profits also surged to $20 billion, marking a significant increase of 15% from the previous year. This growth has been attributed to the successful launch of new products and an expansion in their customer base. Additionally, the company announced plans to invest $10 billion in research and development for the upcoming year, with a focus on innovation and sustainability. The CEO expressed optimism about the company's future prospects and stated that they are well-positioned for continued growth in the market.

data.title: Dollar, bonds, and stocks fall as threat to Fed Chair Powell emerges, sparking "sell America" trend from 2020.
data.description: Last year witnessed a notable movement away from U.S. financial assets, reminiscent of the "sell America" trade trend from before.

data.title: SSA sets minimum standards for stablecoins, as Wyoming's FRNT faces early scrutiny. New Working Group formed.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, the Stablecoin Standards Authority (SSA), operating under FedMSB, announced the formation of the Public-Sector-Associated Stablecoins (Non-CBDC) Standards Technical Working Group (referred to as the "Working Group"). The Working Group aims to set industry standards for stablecoins not backed by central banks. This initiative is a part of the SSA's efforts to regulate the sector and enhance transparency. This move comes at a crucial time as stablecoin adoption continues to rise, reaching a market cap of approximately $150 billion. The Working Group will play a vital role in shaping the future of stablecoins in the financial market, ensuring security and stability for users and investors.

data.title: Yesway opens 2 Allsup's in Odessa & Monahans, Texas. Total Texas stores now 250. Fast-growing convenience chain.
data.description: A prominent convenience retailer operating under the brand Yesway has expanded its presence significantly, now boasting a total of 250 stores in the state of Texas. This growth was highlighted by the recent launch of two new Allsup's stores in Odessa and Monahans. The company, recognized as one of the rapidly expanding convenience store chains in the country, marked the conclusion of the previous year with these new additions, continuing its strategic expansion efforts. The development signifies a notable milestone in the retailer's expansion strategy and its commitment to serving customers within the region.

data.title: Paramount seeks to advance its $30/share offer to Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders, plans to nominate directors and halt Netflix deal.
data.description: Plans are being made to nominate a group of directors to be elected at the WBD 2026 Annual Meeting, alongside a move to campaign against the approval of the Netflix transaction. A lawsuit has been filed with the aim of obtaining essential details for WBD shareholders, ensuring they have the necessary information to make well-informed decisions. This development arose on January 12, 2026, with actions taking place in Los Angeles and New York.
